name: difference
description: The standalone lodash.difference package as a vendorable file. Useful when you want lodash's array difference behavior without another dependency.
tagline: Keep values that are not in the excluded array.
summary: This page ships the published lodash.difference file in both raw and normalized forms. The value is to preserve the known array-difference behavior already used in your codebase.
nativeAlternative: filter plus includes can emulate many cases, but teams may still want the established lodash contract instead of reworking it ad hoc.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization for modern TS projects. The goal is easier import and build compatibility, not changed behavior.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Published package file kept as-is for older teams or repos that still prefer the original CommonJS distribution.

note: Raw and normalized views are both available. Use normalized when you want an ESM and TypeScript-friendly file, and raw when you want the original published package shape.
